basics.name: Prince Kushwaha
basics.title: Full Stack Developer & Project Management
basics.titleAlt: Full Stack Developer | Project Ownership & Operations
basics.locationAlt: Open to All Locations · Remote / Hybrid / On-site
basics.summary: Results-oriented B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering graduate (2025) with demonstrated experience managing end-to-end project lifecycles, coordinating cross-functional teams, and delivering data-backed operational improvements across 5 live production systems serving 300+ daily users. Proven ability to define project scope, identify and mitigate project risks, ensure thorough project documentation, and provide regular support to stakeholders. Open to all opportunities across full-stack development and project management.
highlights: 99%+ uptime maintained across all production deployments
49% reduction in manual effort through workflow automation
30% reduction in monitoring latency via data-backed optimisations
End-to-end project delivery from UAT to post-go-live support
Cross-functional team coordination across Ops, HR & Management

education.institution: IILM College of Engineering & Technology, Noida
education.description: Focused on Data Structures, Algorithms, Web Technologies, Machine Learning, and Software Engineering. CGPA: 7.22/10

experience.description: Led and proactively delivered platform deliverables serving 300+ users — from stakeholder requirement scoping and project scope definition through UAT, deployment, and post-go-live support across 5 live production systems.
achievements: Coordinated cross-functional tasks across Ops, HR & Management — translated ambiguous requirements into structured plans with clear milestones and deliverables
Produced thorough project documentation — scope documents, status reports, and risk registers shared with stakeholders via Google Workspace
Distilled operational data into actionable takeaways — optimisations reduced monitoring latency by 30% and cut manual effort by 49%
Managed change management for rollouts across 300+ users, maintaining 99%+ uptime across all 5 production deployments
Architected and deployed Enterprise HRMS (attendance, payroll, leave & employee management) — eliminating all manual HR operations
Built Lead Management System (oliviams.cloud) with phased rollout — reduced manual tracking effort by 40% through workflow automation

experience.role: Machine Learning with Data Science Intern
experience.description: Built data pipelines and produced structured reports translating findings into actionable recommendations; practised documentation, communication, and teamwork in a deadline-driven environment.
achievements: Built end-to-end data pipelines processing large datasets with Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn
Produced structured analytical reports translating findings into actionable business recommendations
Collaborated in a cross-functional remote team, practising clear communication and deadline management
Created interactive data visualisations using Matplotlib and Seaborn for stakeholder presentations

certifications: Enhancing Soft Skills with Personality — NPTEL
